name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, IQR kept/outlier-rate card diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Updated throughput detail cards to keep the 8-tile layout while renaming P75 Upper to P75 / Q3 and replacing Samples kept with IQR kept plus outlier-rate detail. P25/Q1 remains documented as an IQR calculation concept without adding API, DB, or payload fields.
next_action: Review and commit the throughput detail card display helper, tests, README and whitepaper updates, and refreshed status snapshot; keep unrelated dirty files out of that commit.

last_commands: git diff --check -- src/client/App.tsx src/client/throughput-display.ts test/throughput-display.test.ts README.md docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md
Browser Download/Upload metric modal QA at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844
verification.notes: Throughput detail card verification passed. The new iqrKeptDisplay helper passed focused tests for 82/97, 97/97, and 0/0 cases; typecheck, whitespace diff check, full Vitest suite (97 tests), and production build passed. The PORT=8200 launchd service was restarted after the final build; port 8200 was listening, /api/health returned ok, and the built homepage HTML loaded. Browser QA confirmed Download and Upload detail modals show P75 / Q3, IQR kept, and 0% outliers at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844 with no horizontal overflow and no console warnings/errors. Browser screenshots were saved under /tmp/ping-pong-iqr-kept-*.png.

attention: Current throughput detail card changes are uncommitted in README.md, docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md, src/client/App.tsx, src/client/throughput-display.ts, test/throughput-display.test.ts, and .ai/status.json.

Working tree also remains dirty because of unrelated pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, and docs/analysis-data-debugging.md.
Branch main is ahead of origin/main by 2 commits, including f138669.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.
